Corrected 40 character encoding and OCR errors based on historical context (18th-century Swiss book catalog). Encoding fixes include resolving mojibake sequences (e.g., \u221a\u00b6 to ü, \u221a\u2264 to o, \u221a\u2020 to |, \u221a\u00fc to ß). OCR corrections include standardizing abbreviations (4to., 8vo.), fixing titles (Tempe Helveticum, Homer. Ilias & Odys., Valer. Max.), and correcting text (albo., Stähelins). Total fixes: 41.
